children.text: provide, attempt to provide, or offer to provide a kickback;
solicit, accept, or attempt to accept a kickback; or

children.label: A
children.text: a subcontractor charges a prime contractor or a higher tier subcontractor; or

children.label: B
children.text: a prime contractor charges the Federal Government.
